description_long: This is a robust sledgehammer featuring a large, rectangular black metal head with slightly rounded edges and metallic corner reinforcements. The head is adorned with a red triangular warning or hazard symbol on both broad faces, and each end of the head has a distinct feature: one side is flat for striking, while the opposite side tapers to a pointed spike. The handle is long, cylindrical, and appears to be made of wood, showing a natural brown grain and a smooth finish. The handle is securely fitted into the head and capped with a metallic end, likely for added durability. The overall design suggests it is intended for heavy-duty demolition or construction tasks in urban environments.
description: A heavy-duty sledgehammer with a black metal head, red hazard markings, and a long wooden handle, featuring both a flat striking face and a pointed spike.
description_view_0: Front view shows the narrow end of the hammer head with the pointed spike and the rounded wooden handle end.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the full length of the wooden handle and the broad face of the black metal head with a red hazard symbol.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the rounded end of the handle and the opposite narrow side of the hammer head.
description_view_3: Opposite side view shows the other broad face of the hammer head, also marked with a red hazard symbol, and the pointed spike.
attribute_handle_type: Straight wooden handle with a smooth, cylindrical shape and a natural finish, capped with a metallic end for durability.
attribute_head_type: Rectangular sledgehammer head made of black steel, featuring a flat striking face on one side and a pointed spike on the opposite side, with red hazard markings on the broad faces.
